channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: जाको राखे साइयां, मारि सके न कोय । बाल न बांका करि सके, जो जग बैरी होय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: He whom God protects, no one can kill. Not a hair can be harmed, even if the whole world is an enemy.

Translation: Whom God protects, none can slay. Not a hair is harmed if the world is a foe.
item.guid: जाको राखे साइयां, मारि सके न कोय । बाल न बांका करि सके, जो जग बैरी होय ॥493370

item.title: कबीरा संगत साधु की, कदे न निरफल होय । लोहा कंचन होत है, जो पारस परसे कोय ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Company with a saint never goes in vain. Just as iron turns to gold when it touches the philosopher's stone.

Translation: Company of a saint is never wasted. Iron turns to gold by the touch of the stone.
item.guid: कबीरा संगत साधु की, कदे न निरफल होय । लोहा कंचन होत है, जो पारस परसे कोय ॥493371

item.title: लूटि सके तो लूट ले, राम नाम की लूट । पाछे ही पछताओगे, प्राण जाहिंगे छूटि ॥
item.description:
Meaning: Gather the name of God while you can. You will regret it later when life leaves your body.

Translation: Gather God's name now. You will regret it when life departs.
item.guid: लूटि सके तो लूट ले, राम नाम की लूट । पाछे ही पछताओगे, प्राण जाहिंगे छूटि ॥493372
